title: ParamasivamJ/Enterprise-Knowledge-Assistant
summary: ParamasivamJ/Enterprise-Knowledge-Assistant 是一个基于 FastAPI、Next.js 和 Qdrant 的生产级检索增强生成 (RAG) 系统。它具备自动化文档摄取、基于引用的低延迟流式问答和全面的行政评估仪表板。该系统采用高效的模型训练和推理架构，支持大规模知识库的快速检索和生成，适用于企业级知识管理。
description: A production-ready Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system built with FastAPI, Next.js, and Qdrant. Features automated document ingestion, citation-grounded answers with low-latency streaming, and a comprehensive admin evaluation dashboard.
